channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I've found 7 top laptop deals in the latest Best Buy sale — HP, Asus, Lenovo, and Apple from $159
item.description: The Best Buy Ultimate Upgrade sale features some excellent laptop deals this week, so I've picked out seven of the top offers that I'd recommend buying.

item.title: Cette comète va devenir visible à l’œil nu et ce sera notre seule chance : voici comment l’observer
item.description: La comète C/2025 R3 va devenir visible depuis la Terre d'ici quelques jours. Une occasion rare pour observer un astre, dont le passage s'annonce spectaculaire. Voici quelques conseils pour pouvoir en profiter un maximum.

item.title: Marvel Legends Is Taking on ‘Marvel Rivals,’ and It Looks Great
item.description: The first wave of Hasbro figures inspired by the hit hero shooter isn't forming a meta-comp team any time soon, but they make up for it with some stylish looks.

item.title: Looking for a lightweight vacuum? I'm a professional reviewer and these are the models I swear by for effective cleaning with minimal strain
item.description: Modern cordless vacuums are getting ever heavier, but these models buck the trend by keeping things light without sacrificing cleaning power.

item.title: Dyson's latest floor cleaner is a super-slim electric mop that got my hard floors sparkling in minutes
item.description: The Dyson PencilWash couldn't be easier to use, and makes light work of wet and dry dirt, but only if your wallet can stand it.

item.title: Telegram Is Still Hosting a Sanctioned $21 Billion Crypto Scammer Black Market
item.description: The UK designated Xinbi Guarantee as an enabler of crypto scammers and human trafficking weeks ago. Telegram is still hosting it in plain sight.

item.title: The OpenAI-Anthropic Cold War Comes to Illinois
item.description: A proxy war in the Land of Lincoln.

item.title: The Saros 20 is a predictably accomplished addition to Roborock's robot vacuum lineup, delivering all-round cleaning excellence
item.description: Roborock has taken all the things that were great about this model's predecessor and sprinkled some nifty extra features on top.

item.title: Trump’s ‘DoorDash Grandma’ Stunt Makes Life Hell for PR Flack
item.description: DoorDash has tied its brand to a very unpopular president, for seemingly no benefit.

item.title: Someone planted backdoors in dozens of WordPress plug-ins used in thousands of websites
item.description: Dozens of WordPress plug-ins were allegedly hijacked to push malware after they were sold to a new corporate owner.

item.title: Prime Video is bundling Apple TV Plus and Peacock for a limited time
item.description: Amazon is offering Prime Video subscribers a way to get Apple TV Plus and Peacock Premium Plus at a discount. With a new bundle, subscribers can access all content from both services directly through Prime Video. The bundle includes both streaming services for $19.99 per month, as opposed to the total $29.98 per month it […]

item.title: Gik Acoustics SoundBlocks Review: Good-Looking Acoustic Treatment
item.description: Treating the sound of your space has often involved ugly, permanently mounted panels, but no longer!

item.title: Privacy advocates want Google to stop handing consumer data over to ICE
item.description: The Electronic Frontier Foundation (EFF) is asking the attorneys general of California and New York to investigate Google for deceptive trade practices, saying the tech giant fails to notify users before handing over their data to law enforcement agencies like ICE. "For nearly a decade, Google has promised billions of users that it will notify […]

item.title: Microsoft raises prices on Surface PCs due to skyrocketing RAM costs
item.description: The RAMpocalypse continues. Microsoft just revealed significant price increases across the entire Surface line of products, according to reporting by Windows Central. The updated pricing has already hit the official Microsoft Store, with other retailers expected to follow suit in the near future. These are fairly significant upticks. For instance, the base model 15-inch Surface Laptop 7 now starts at $1,600. It cost $1,300 when the laptop was first released back in 2024. It did receive a price increase last year to $1,500, so today's increase tacks on another $100. The cost balloons even furth...

item.title: 'I’m pretty sure actually we really do not need to work for five days' Zoom CEO calls for end of traditional work schedules — says 3-day working week should become the norm
item.description: Zoom CEO envisions AI becoming so powerful that workers might be able to earn themselves some time off work.

item.title: ‘Andor’ Star Adria Arjona Is Joining ‘Man of Tomorrow’—But Maybe Not as Who You Thought
item.description: The 'Superman' sequel has added Arjona after a round of casting rumors that even James Gunn weighed in on.

item.title: Anthropic co-founder confirms the company briefed the Trump administration on Mythos
item.description: In an interview at the Semafor World Economy summit this week, Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark explained why the company was still engaged with the U.S. government while simultaneously suing them.

item.title: Here’s What Scientists Found When They Cooked Up Their Own ‘Mercury Rocks’
item.description: Sulfur on Mercury was as important to the planet's formation as oxygen was to Earth's evolution, the study suggests.

item.title: The attacks on Sam Altman are a warning for the AI world
item.description: Before allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home, the 20-year-old accused attacker wrote about his fear that the AI race would cause humans to go extinct, the San Francisco Chronicle found. Two days later, Altman's home appeared to be targeted a second time, according to The San Francisco Standard. Only a […]

item.title: Matière noire : et si elle existait en deux formes ? Une théorie pourrait enfin résoudre l’énigme
item.description: La matière noire est l'une des composantes fondamentales du cosmos observable, ou du moins, jusqu'à présent, elle apparaît comme telle, notamment parce que sans elle, il semble bien que les galaxies ne se seraient pas encore formées après le Big Bang. Sa nature reste élusive et plus le temps...

item.title: J’ai testé le Xiaomi 17 et il n’était pas prêt pour autant de puissance
item.description: Xiaomi continue de proposer des smartphones haut de gamme compacts. Le petit dernier, c'est le Xiaomi 17 qui embarque les meilleurs composants du moment. Mais était-ce une bonne idée ?

item.title: London gets closer to its first robotaxi service as Waymo begins testing
item.description: Waymo's commercial service will eventually follow testing if the U.K. government approves.

item.title: Elon Musk grilled by senator over X Money plans
item.description: Elon Musk is facing questions about his upcoming payments platform, X Money, and whether it will allow users to safely perform transactions. In a letter to Musk on Tuesday, Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) writes that X Money could pose a risk to "consumers, our national security, and the stability of the financial system," citing Musk's […]

item.title: I Watched 18 Hours of Coachella’s Vertical Livestream and All I Got Was This Lousy FOMO
item.description: Coachella—and everyone else—is making a big vertical video play. So I watched an entire weekend’s worth of sets only on my phone.

item.title: You can grab LG’s B5 OLED TV for over 50 percent off right now
item.description: ​​If you’re looking to get OLED picture quality without spending a couple thousand dollars, LG’s 48-inch B5 OLED TV is on sale for $599.99 ($700 off) at Best Buy, which is one of the best prices we’ve seen on the budget-friendly TV. You can also buy the 55-inch model from Amazon, Best Buy, and LG […]

item.title: Artemis II crew stored iconic Earth photos on the same $460 memory card you can now buy on Amazon
item.description: The same 400GB memory card used to store Artemis II Moon photos is now available to photographers on Earth.

item.title: The Segway Navimow i210E LiDAR Pro delivers orderly autonomous mowing with impressive navigation accuracy
item.description: Segway's latest robot mower brings composed performance to challenging terrain

item.title: Luxury watchmakers brace for more uncertainty with the war in Iran
item.description: Renewed inflation pressures and doubts about consumer confidence are injecting new uncertainty into the market. The bling is back, but the Iran war has tarnished the outlook for the luxury watch industry — the ultimate in opulence.

item.title: Leaked images reveal a dual-lens pro version of DJI’s next Osmo Pocket camera
item.description: Reliable leaker Igor Bogdanov shared an image on X yesterday of an unseen person holding two versions of a handheld stabilized camera, including one that's rumored to be a pro version of the DJI Osmo Pocket 4. The company is expected to announce the latest version of its baby steadicam on April 16th following months […]
